scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; bun run --filter '@ink-mirror/daemon' dev & bun run --filter '@ink-mirror/web' dev & wait
scripts.start: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; bun run --filter '@ink-mirror/daemon' start & bun run --filter '@ink-mirror/web' start & wait
scripts.test: bun test packages/shared packages/daemon/tests packages/cli/tests packages/web/tests
